General.Name: Venus Metals Corporation Ltd
General.Description: Venus Metals Corporation Limited engages in the exploration of mineral tenements in Western Australia. It explores gold, base metals, vanadium-titanium, and lithium deposits. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.

1.Name: Mr. Selvakumar  Arunachalam Dip Sci., M.Tech, MAusIMM M.Sc, PG Dip
1.Title: GM & Executive Director
